78979227.title: Rein Me In
78979227.extract: "Rein Me In" is a song by English singer-songwriters Sam Fender and Olivia Dean. It is a remix of the song of the same name from Fender's third studio album People Watching. "Rein Me In" was released on 20 June 2025 as the sixth single from the album, eventually topping the UK Singles Chart in February 2026 and being nominated at the Brit Awards for Song of the Year. Outside the United Kingdom, "Rein Me In" also topped the charts in Ireland and the top ten of the charts in Australia, the Netherlands and New Zealand.
